CustomField.description: When enabled, NPPatch automatically creates a Recurring Donation Change Log record whenever key fields on a Recurring Donation are modified, including Amount, Installment Period, Installment Frequency, Day of Month, and Campaign. This provides an audit trail of changes to recurring giving commitments. Disabled by default. Requires Enhanced Recurring Donations.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Track changes to Recurring Donation amount, schedule, and campaign fields by automatically creating Change Log records.
CustomField.label: Enable Recurring Donation Change Log
